name: Gongfeng
description: MCP server for Gongfeng API, supporting repository management, file operations, and more.
description_zh: 工蜂 API 的 MCP 服务器，支持仓库管理、文件操作等功能。
description_en: MCP server for Gongfeng API, supporting repository management, file operations, and more.
examples_zh: 列出我在工蜂上的所有仓库
查看仓库 my-project 的最近提交记录
获取仓库 my-project 中 README.md 文件的内容
搜索工蜂仓库中包含「config」的文件
查看仓库 my-project 的分支列表
examples_en: List all my repositories on Gongfeng
View recent commits of the repository my-project
Get the content of README.md in the repository my-project
Search for files containing 'config' in the Gongfeng repository
View the branch list of the repository my-project
